fields.name: title
fields.label: SEO · Page title
fields.description: 50–60 chars. Primary keyword first. Ends with "| eme".

fields.name: description
fields.label: SEO · Meta description
fields.description: 140–155 chars. Value claim, proof point, CTA.

fields.name: slug
fields.label: URL slug (preserves SEO history)
fields.description: e.g. aluminum-gantry-crane-4400-series — do NOT change on live pages without a 301

fields.name: outcomeMetric
fields.label: Outcome metric (required)
fields.description: e.g. "Saved $18,000 on crane truck line item" — stories without a metric do not convert.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
